personal.name: Adamya Varshney
personal.title: Product Manager | AI & Agentic Products
personal.bio:
Hey 👋
I'm Adamya, a Product Manager with 3.5+ years across 0-to-N product development, GTM strategy, and marketing analytics. I've shipped end-to-end lifecycles — from MVP to market expansion — for B2B and D2C e-commerce, including digital journeys and Agentic AI solutions. I lead cross-functional teams toward quantifiable impact: 17% retention lifts, 3000+ new premium sellers, and AI products generating 100+ Cr in monthly revenue. I think customer-first, decide data-first, and love turning ambiguous problems into measurable outcomes.

current.degree: MBA, Majors in IT-Data Analytics & Marketing

previous.institution: Zakir Husain College of Engineering and Technology, A.M.U.

achievements: National Finalist at V-Guard Big Idea Business Plan Contest 2024 (competing against 2000+ product ideas with Aeromist)
2nd Runners-up in DASHBOARD WAR 3.0 at IIM Kashipur (Data Cleaning, Visualization & Analysis)
Gold Medal in IIM Kashipur's URP — 3-month consulting engagement for an NGO on Process & Learning Management

experience.description: Owning the Annual Product Life Cycle for IndiaMART's Premium B2B products. Boosted seller retention by 17% and expanded the Premium-tier base by 3000+ sellers via a 30-day GTM plan launching 4 new products. Designed differential pricing, incentive schemes, 20+ marketing campaigns, and service SOPs to accelerate adoption. Built 6 AI-based conversion analytics dashboards to manage the hot-lead pipeline down to the field-executive level, and shipped an AI RAG agent that cut inter-department knowledge-retrieval time from 3 days to seconds. Managing a portfolio of 6+ AI-driven B2B matchmaking products generating 100+ Cr in monthly revenue.

Led an 8-member cross-functional team through customer research, persona creation, and MVP feature ideation for the AIMERS platform. Executed the AIMERS website MVP while tracking user engagement, DAU, retention, satisfaction, feature adoption, and churn. Managed 70% of development, owning the user flow and enabling accessibility for visually impaired users.

Delivered 50+ learning modules covering 25% of flagship offerings, contributing to a 15% increase in customer acquisition and retention. Developed 50+ hours of digital content, driving a 20% month-over-month increase in course webpage visits and mock-test sign-ups.

Drove a 25% boost in engagement via strategic content-led growth across Facebook, Instagram, LinkedIn, and YouTube. Contributed 250+ hours of video content covering 85% of the PrepLadder App's feature-development cycle. Devised 150+ hours of SEO-optimized short-form YouTube content, adding 1,200+ subscribers and strengthening top-of-funnel awareness.

certifications.name: AI-First Product Management Fellowship
certifications.grade: Focused on AI Product Strategy & Development

certifications.name: Google 5-Day GenAI Intensive — Built 'Fake Buster' (RAG fact-checking agent using Gemini & ChromaDB)

projects.title: Growmatic
projects.description: An AI-driven CRM that automates lead qualification and ad-content generation to simplify marketing for SMBs. Designed to compress the qualify-to-convert funnel and let small teams run enterprise-grade lead ops without a dedicated marketing function.

projects.title: Bundles & Buddy Mode
projects.description: Quick-commerce features that convert reactive checkouts into planned purchases, designed to drive AOV growth for a Blinkit-style platform.

images.alt: Bundles & Buddy Mode — quick-commerce checkout concept

projects.title: Xcurson
projects.description: An AI travel planner built via vibe-coding, with a modular architecture for crafting contextual, personalized itineraries.

projects.title: Sam
projects.description: A LangGraph AI agent bot with multi-threaded chat memory and real-time response streaming, built with Streamlit.

projects.title: Pocket
projects.description: An AI expense tracker offering smart cash-flow management and visual summaries that explain spending habits.

images.alt: Pocket — AI expense tracker with spending insights

projects.title: Diabetic Retinopathy Detection (CNN)
projects.description: A CNN deep-learning model that detects diabetic retinopathy with 72% accuracy on the Messidor dataset of 1,151 retinal images.

projects.title: IMDB Sentiment & Topic Analysis
projects.description: Analyzed 40,000+ IMDB reviews using VADER and Logistic Regression, achieving 78.23% accuracy in sentiment and topic analysis.

projects.title: Niyam (AI Fitness Coach)
projects.description: An AI fitness coach that generates personalized workout and habit plans and keeps users accountable to their goals.

projects.title: Onset : Investment Platform
projects.description: An investment platform concept that simplifies portfolio building and guides first-time investors through their first steps.

projects.title: Zomato : Farm Fresh
projects.description: A farm-to-table feature concept for Zomato ('Farm Fresh' / BiteBox) connecting users with fresh local produce.

images.alt: Zomato Farm Fresh — farm-to-table feature concept

projects.title: OpenAI : Project TAGs
projects.description: A feature concept that adds tagging and organization to ChatGPT Projects for faster workspace navigation.

images.alt: OpenAI Project TAGs — ChatGPT Projects tagging concept

projects.title: LLM Fine-tuning : Llama Model on Custom Dataset
projects.description: Fine-tuned a Llama model on a custom dataset — covering data preparation, training, and evaluation.

internship.availability: Open to senior Product Manager opportunities
internship.workStyle: Customer-centric, data-driven PM who pairs design-thinking with quantitative rigor across the full product lifecycle
internship.goals: Build AI-native products that move real metrics. I want to own ambiguous 0-to-N problems end to end — research to GTM — on teams that care as much about user empathy as they do about measurable impact.

funFacts: Manages a portfolio of AI-driven B2B products generating 100+ Cr in monthly revenue
Launched 4 new products in a 30-day GTM sprint, adding 3000+ premium sellers
Built a RAG agent that cut cross-team knowledge retrieval from 3 days to seconds
National Finalist at V-Guard Big Idea among 2000+ ideas
personality.workingStyle: I lead with the customer problem, validate with data, and ship in tight, measurable loops
personality.motivation: Turning ambiguous, high-stakes product problems into outcomes you can measure on a dashboard
